headline: Buchwald Doubles Down on Creator Economy with Powerhouse Talent Team
lede: Talent agency Buchwald is making a bold play in the digital representation landscape by launching its dedicated creators division, signaling a strategic bet on influencer and online talent markets.
body:
Buchwald is expanding its strategic footprint in the fast-evolving creator representation ecosystem, unveiling Buchwald Creators as a dedicated division to capitalize on digital talent's explosive growth.

Max Nagler, who joined the agency as Vice President of Branding & Creators in 2025, will helm the new initiative. His appointment suggests Buchwald is positioning itself as a serious player in an increasingly competitive talent representation space.

The division's inaugural hires, agents Mia Conte and Michael Del Moral, bring significant industry credibility and network connections. These strategic additions indicate Buchwald's commitment to building a robust creator talent roster across multiple digital platforms.

Industry observers note the move reflects broader shifts in entertainment representation. Traditional talent agencies are rapidly adapting to accommodate content creators who command massive online audiences and significant monetization potential.

Buchwald's expansion arrives at a critical moment when digital creators are generating revenue streams that rival traditional entertainment talent. Influencers, streamers, and online personalities now represent a multibillion-dollar talent ecosystem demanding sophisticated representation strategies.
key_facts: Max Nagler to lead new talent team
Mia Conte and Michael Del Moral join as inaugural agents
Signals agency's strategic digital talent bet
